content: You appear to be stuck on [Explore Dawnbreak system thoroughly. Check every location — Dawnbreak I (planet), Dawnbreak Frozen Drift, Dawnbreak Star. Look for any stations, outposts, or refueling opportunities not visible from current position. Use scan or survey commands if available. We are at 34/90 fuel with no known stations in this system — finding one here would be the difference between survival and being stranded.] in phase active for 15 minutes. Assess your current situation and either continue or abandon and replan.
